description: Add 'solo' to TENANT_TIERS array so it becomes ['solo', 'pro', 'premium']
Update TenantTier type to include 'solo'
Add TIER_LABELS entry: solo -> 'Solo'
Add TIER_RANK record: { solo: 0, pro: 1, premium: 2 }
Add tierAtLeast(tier, minimum) helper using TIER_RANK comparison
Add INTEGRATIONS to TIER_FEATURES enum with min tier 'pro'
Add EXTENSIONS to TIER_FEATURES enum with min tier 'pro'
Add MANAGED_EMAIL to TIER_FEATURES enum with min tier 'pro'
Add SSO to TIER_FEATURES enum with min tier 'pro'
Add ADVANCED_ASSETS to TIER_FEATURES enum with min tier 'pro'
Add CLIENT_PORTAL_ADMIN to TIER_FEATURES enum with min tier 'pro'
Add WORKFLOW_DESIGNER to TIER_FEATURES enum with min tier 'pro'
Add MOBILE_ACCESS to TIER_FEATURES enum with min tier 'pro'
Rewrite tierHasFeature() to use TIER_RANK comparison instead of map lookup
Derive TIER_FEATURE_MAP from FEATURE_MINIMUM_TIER + TIER_RANK
Add AI_ASSISTANT to ADD_ONS enum
Add ADD_ON_LABELS record with AI_ASSISTANT -> 'AI Assistant'
Add ADD_ON_DESCRIPTIONS with marketing-friendly description for AI_ASSISTANT
resolveTier() returns 'pro' for null/invalid input (unchanged behavior, Solo is opt-in)
isValidTier('solo') returns true
Create getActiveAddOns(tenantId) service querying tenant_addons for non-expired add-ons
Create assertAddOnAccess(addOn) that throws if tenant lacks the add-on
assertAddOnAccess bypasses check in CE edition (all add-ons unlocked)
Add STRIPE_AI_ADDON_PRICE_ID and STRIPE_AI_ADDON_ANNUAL_PRICE_ID env vars to Stripe config
Add isSolo boolean to TierContextValue (tier === 'solo')
Add addOns array to TierContextValue populated from session/DB
Add hasAddOn(addOn) helper to TierContextValue
CE edition bypasses add-on checks (hasAddOn returns true for all)
Add requiredFeature?: TIER_FEATURES to MenuItem interface in menuConfig
Annotate Extensions menu item with requiredFeature: TIER_FEATURES.EXTENSIONS
Annotate Workflow Editor subitem with requiredFeature: TIER_FEATURES.WORKFLOW_DESIGNER
SidebarWithFeatureFlags filters out menu items where requiredFeature is set and tier lacks it
Sidebar filtering applies recursively to subItems
Add requiredFeature?: TIER_FEATURES to TabContent type in SettingsPage
Tag Integrations settings tab with TIER_FEATURES.INTEGRATIONS
Tag Extensions settings tab with TIER_FEATURES.EXTENSIONS
Tag Email settings tab with TIER_FEATURES.MANAGED_EMAIL
Render FeatureUpgradeNotice instead of content when tab's requiredFeature is gated
Gated settings tabs remain visible and clickable (not hidden)
Settings sidebar items remain visible regardless of tier (no requiredFeature filtering in settings mode)
Add assertTierAccess(TIER_FEATURES.INTEGRATIONS) to calendar/entra/teams EE route handlers
Add assertTierAccess(TIER_FEATURES.EXTENSIONS) to extension install/uninstall EE route handlers
Add assertTierAccess(TIER_FEATURES.MANAGED_EMAIL) to managed email EE handlers
Add assertTierAccess(TIER_FEATURES.SSO) to SSO/OAuth EE handlers
Add assertTierAccess(TIER_FEATURES.ADVANCED_ASSETS) to RMM EE handlers
Add assertAddOnAccess(ADD_ONS.AI_ASSISTANT) to chat completions route
Add assertAddOnAccess(ADD_ONS.AI_ASSISTANT) to document-assist route
Gate RightSidebar AI component with hasAddOn(ADD_ONS.AI_ASSISTANT)
Check tenant tier in exchangeOttForSession() — reject Solo with 403
Return upgrade message in 403 response for Solo mobile auth attempts
Add 'alga-psa-solo': 'solo' to stripeTierMapping
getTierPriceIds() returns { basePriceId, userPriceId: null } for Solo
createLicenseCheckoutSession() emits single line item when userPriceId is null
handleCheckoutCompleted sets licensed_user_count = 1 for Solo (no per-user item)
handleSubscriptionUpdated sets licensed_user_count = 1 for Solo
upgradeTier() supports Solo -> Pro: adds per-user line item, swaps base price
New downgradeTier() validates active user count = 1 before proceeding
downgradeTier() removes per-user item and swaps base price to Solo
purchaseAddOn(AI_ASSISTANT) creates checkout session for AI add-on subscription item
cancelAddOn(AI_ASSISTANT) removes AI line item from subscription
Stripe webhook inserts tenant_addons row when AI subscription item is activated
Stripe webhook deactivates tenant_addons row when AI subscription item is removed/cancelled
Add env vars to .env.example: STRIPE_SOLO_BASE_PRICE_ID, STRIPE_SOLO_BASE_ANNUAL_PRICE_ID, STRIPE_AI_ADDON_PRICE_ID, STRIPE_AI_ADDON_ANNUAL_PRICE_ID
Block addUser action when plan is 'solo' and used >= 1 internal users
Return error 'Solo plan is limited to 1 user. Upgrade to Pro to add more users.' on block
Disable 'Add User' button in user management UI when isSolo with upgrade CTA
Add FEATURE_DISPLAY_NAMES entries for all 8 new TIER_FEATURES in AccountManagement
Solo-specific messaging on account page: 'Your Solo plan includes core PSA features...'
Show 'Upgrade to Pro' card for Solo tenants in AccountManagement
Show 'Downgrade to Solo' option for Pro tenants when active user count = 1
Show 'Add AI Assistant' purchase card when add-on is not active (any tier)
Show 'AI Assistant (active)' status when add-on is active with cancel option
Update upgradeTierAction() to support Solo -> Pro
Add downgradeTierAction() with user count validation
Solo checkout includes 7-day trial period (trialDays=7)
Solo->Pro trial: activate Pro features for established Solo customers (past 7-day trial)
Solo->Pro trial blocked if customer is still in their Solo trial period
Solo->Pro trial reverts to Solo at trial end if not converted to paid Pro
Show 'Try Pro free' CTA for established Solo customers in AccountManagement
